This home was upgraded from an oversized single-stage furnace and A/C to a properly sized, fully communicating modulating gas furnace paired with a 19 SEER2 high-efficiency heat pump.

We also installed a powered whole-home humidifier to maintain healthier indoor humidity during the winter—helping reduce dry air, improve comfort, protect wood furnishings, and make your home feel warmer at lower thermostat settings.

The result:
✅ More consistent temperatures
✅ Lower energy bills
✅ Quieter operation
✅ Healthier indoor air quality
✅ Year-round comfort with intelligent system control

At Complete Home Comfort, we don’t just replace equipment—we design complete comfort systems that are properly sized, professionally installed, and built to perform for years to come.

images.caption:
Don’t wait until your air conditioner breaks down on the hottest day of the year.

Your outdoor condenser is responsible for rejecting heat from your home, but when the coil becomes packed with dirt, dust, pollen, and debris, airflow is restricted. That forces your system to work harder, run longer, and consume more electricity just to keep up.

Routine maintenance helps:
✅ Lower energy bills
✅ Improve cooling performance
✅ Reduce the risk of costly breakdowns
✅ Extend the life of your equipment
✅ Keep your manufacturer warranty protected on many systems

The before-and-after photos below are a perfect example of how much buildup can accumulate over time—even if your system appears to be working normally.

A clean system is an efficient system.

📞 Schedule your AC maintenance today before the summer heat puts unnecessary stress on your equipment.

Complete Home Comfort
📞 412-757-2301
🌐 www.completehomecomfortpgh.com

images.caption:
Another outdated electric resistance heat pump system replaced the right way. 🔥❄️

We removed an old inefficient heat pump that relied heavily on expensive electric resistance heat and installed a new high-efficiency modulating heat pump system designed from the ground up using ACCA Manual J load calculations.

The result? A properly sized system that provides year-round heating and cooling using the heat pump itself—even through Pittsburgh winters—while delivering improved comfort, lower energy bills, and longer equipment life.

No guessing. No oversizing. Just proper design, proper installation, and comfort that lasts.

Complete Home Comfort
Heat Pumps Installed To Last.#pittsburghhvac #northhillspittsburgh #energyefficiency #hvacpittsburgh #pittsburgh

images.alt: Quality is in the details.

images.caption:
Bigger isn’t better when it comes to HVAC. Proper sizing starts with a Manual J load calculation.

A real HVAC professional doesn’t guess system size — we calculate it.

A Manual J load calculation looks at:
✔ Home square footage
✔ Insulation levels
✔ Window type & orientation
✔ Air leakage
✔ Ceiling height
✔ Local climate (yes, Pittsburgh matters ❄️🔥)

Why it matters 👇
🚫 Oversized systems = short cycling, poor humidity control, higher energy bills
🚫 Undersized systems = uncomfortable homes and nonstop run time
✅ Properly sized systems = comfort, efficiency, and longer equipment life

At Complete Home Comfort, we size systems the right way — not by rule of thumb or what was there before.

If you’re getting quotes without load calculations… you’re probably not getting the full picture.

📞 412-757-2301
Your local HVAC experts serving the Pittsburgh area.  #northhillspittsburgh #pittsburghhvac #hvacpittsburgh #heatpumps #homecomfort
images.alt: Bigger isn’t better when it comes to HVAC.

images.caption:
❄️🔥 Cold-Climate Heat Pumps Built for Pittsburgh Winters 🔥❄️

If you live in Pittsburgh, you know winter isn’t just “cold” — it’s long, cold, and unpredictable. The good news? Modern cold-climate heat pumps are designed for exactly this kind of weather.

✅ Reliable heat in Western PA winters – Today’s cold-climate heat pumps are engineered to deliver heat even when temperatures drop into the single digits and below.
✅ Lower heating bills – They use electricity efficiently instead of burning oil or gas, helping homeowners reduce monthly energy costs.
✅ Perfect for older Pittsburgh homes – Great option for houses with boilers, aging furnaces, or uneven heating across floors.
✅ One system, all year – Efficient heating in winter and powerful air conditioning during our humid summers.
✅ Cleaner & quieter comfort – No combustion, fewer emissions, and steady heat without loud cycling.

Heat pumps are also an excellent fit for dual-fuel systems, giving you the efficiency of electric heat with backup support during extreme cold snaps.

📍 Serving Pittsburgh & surrounding areas
Our HVAC team specializes in cold-climate heat pump systems designed specifically for Western Pennsylvania homes.

📞 Thinking about upgrading your heating system?
Call or message us today to see if a cold-climate heat pump is right for your home.

#PittsburghHVAC #WesternPAHomes #ColdClimateHeatPump #PittsburghWinter #energyefficientheating
